title: Mrs. Serial Killer
tmdbOverview: When her husband is framed and imprisoned for serial murders, a doting wife must perform a copycat murder, to prove her husband's innocence.
synopsis: Mrs. Serial Killer (2020) is a thriller film from India. It has a 4.0 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (HU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
